name: search_spec_clause_library
desc: Search the clause library by keyword, discipline, Uniclass code, building type, or clause type.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Free-text search across clause title, text, and tags

parameters.name: discipline
parameters.description: Filter by discipline name (e.g. Drainage, Power, Lighting)

parameters.name: uniclassCode
parameters.description: Filter by Uniclass code prefix (e.g. Ss_32)

parameters.name: clauseType
parameters.description: Filter by clause type (General, Performance, Material, Installation, Testing, Commissioning, Maintenance, Warranty, Compliance)
